name: @mcowger/pi-llmgateway
description_en: A Pi extension that adds [LLM Gateway](https://llmgateway.io) as a model provider, giving you access to 160+ chat models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, Mistral, DeepSeek, and many others through a single OpenAI-compatible API.
description_zh: Pi 扩展，将 [LLM Gateway](https://llmgateway.io) 作为模型提供程序添加，通过单一 OpenAI 兼容 API 访问 OpenAI、Anthropic、Google、xAI、Mistral、DeepSeek 等的 160+ 个聊天模型
